parsed_json.hallucination_assessment: The models tend to infer additional propositional content beyond what is explicitly stated. While the source makes a fundamental distinction between automatic thoughts and evidence, the models frequently infer that the speaker is evaluating or reflecting on these elements, implying activities like self-reflection or the application of an objective standard. This suggests that the models are filling in gaps by attributing reflective processes that are not specified in the source statement.
parsed_json.inter_model_variance: There is some variance between models in what they infer, particularly regarding the level of self-reflective capacity they attribute to the speaker. Some models assert more detailed cognitive processes or value systems that are not overtly mentioned in the source.
